author: pk910
content:
I'm working on a bigger refactoring of the builderapi, that should fix this issue too.
In the current builder api implementation the payload is released immediately and only on the post beacon_block call.
In my refactoring, the payload takes the usual deleayed reveal path as if the p2p bid was won.


Can you share your config?  I've had some troubles finding a usable post-gloas builder api client config 😉

author: terencechain
content:
Try this one, it should work. https://gist.github.com/terencechain/3e10f6cd981e491c55ca8a435e5ddd05
We have merged all the builder api changes to main branch. So just take latest `develop` , it's convinent now

author: nflaig
content: while the builder should definitely have a retry mechansim this is also something the CL should handle

author: nflaig
content:
> buildoor: failed to publish execution payload envelope ... 404 Block not found (lodestar hasn't imported the block yet)
I implemented queuing on the api here https://github.com/ChainSafe/lodestar/pull/9520 recently, just wasn't part of devnet-6 branch, with this if you submit the payload envelope earlier, we will queue it until the end of the slot, or until we receive the corresponding block either via gossip or api

author: nflaig
content: new `glamsterdam-devnet-6` is out with the queuing so this race condition should be resolved now
